item.title: A young woman stayed with her horse for 3 hours, holding his head above water to keep him from drowning after he got trapped in mud.
item.description: The 500kg horse, named Astro, was freed with the help of a tractor and harness at Avalon Beach in Victoria, Australia.
item.dc:creator: kenistod

item.title: The Butter it BURNS IS US!
item.description: Remember, never use roasts for only steak grilling. I know it's a tiktok but I thought this was genuinely funny and informative. Plus his Gronk and Smeagol impression is on point. Sauce: Farming While Beige https://youtube.com/@blackbirdcoop?si=e-6MjXlMoVtu0iM0

item.description: I kid, I kid. Fuck Chik-Fil-A.
item.dc:creator: sleeperkid

item.title: We could have had this guy in office right now.
item.description: It sickens and depresses me how this country treated Joe Biden. Here's a guy who tried to live a life of public service, despite atrocious tragedy that for most people would simply end them. To have served as Senator, VP, President... to have wrested America as far back from the fascist brink as anyone reasonably could have in four years, and accomplished more than anyone else since LBJ... only for everyone to forget and chuck him aside in favor of a man like Trump. Because eggs were expensive. Because he didn't nuke Israel. Because he was eighty fucking years old and slowing down with age. But still better than most of us even on a bad day. We could have had the guy who wrote memos like this. Instead we have Trump.
item.dc:creator: IDontKnowWhatToDoAnymoreAndImTired

item.description:

26 Man Tax: David Witts
"War, at first, is the hope that one will be better off; next, the expectation that the other fellow will be worse off; then, the satisfaction that he isn't any better off; and, finally, the surprise at everyone's being worse off." -Karl Kraus So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. For the couple people that have said I'm "scamming" people, I only get SNAP, so this money goes to things like TP, shampoo, laundry detergent, etc. Tag me if you see an artist/creator you like whose work isn't getting seen as much as it should be! Or if you are an artist/creator and want me to post something of yours, **Imgur Creator Spotlight is now in your hands!! Having trouble finding people I haven't already featured recently. Now I'm going to just do who YOU nominate. Tag me or DM me and I'll feature whoever you pick.**
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.dc:creator: bingoboyo

item.title: I want to report a murder!
item.description: Ukrainian ambassador to the UN Melnyk Andrij: I'm not sure that I will have any appetite to visit Moscow. Even when Russia is defeated, even when and after Putin's regime has collapsed, even after Russia has paid war reparations, even when the next government in Russia were to beg on its kneels for an apology, even after all the Russian war criminals will be sentenced, there will be no reconciliation between Ukraine and Russia for decades, maybe for centuries. I will even refuse to visit Moscow as a member of the Ukraine delegation that will travel to Russia to witness Russia's signature of its declaration of capitulation
item.dc:creator: vladrichdemaclant

item.title: Removing invasive sea urchins from a reef in New Zealand
item.dc:creator: Sleave34

item.title: Results of my Reze cosplay from Chainsaw Man photoshoot in Tokyo Shibya's Neon Lights - YuzuPyon
item.description: Source : https://www.instagram.com/reel/DYr-G8bSjs_/ Hello everyone! I have not posted in over a month due to my massive move across Canada + my health that deteriorated afterwards :( Posting again is really stressful for some reason, but I am also glad to be back to my activities! I have missed being creative and make content so I hope you enjoy my new video :)!! I have a few videos of these modelling projects I did in Japan back in March, if you're interested to see more let me know :D Should I post the results of this photoshoot as a photo post? I think the videos are nice to show the BTS but also would like to post the final results... let me know please :D Photographer is https://www.instagram.com/hero_nightwalker
item.dc:creator: yuzupyon

item.title: I Got a MEGAcheets!
item.description:
I love Pocheets (Pochita from Chainsaw Man) and couldn’t get over the size of this boy :D
My army and my collection shall GROW
item.dc:creator: Alsoashley
